definition: Interbank Price Delivery Algorithm — the theory that institutional algorithms reference 20, 40, and 60 trading-day lookback ranges to determine where price 'should' be delivered next.
feeds_into: market_structure (IPDA ranges define macro dealing ranges)
daily_bias (IPDA midpoints act as equilibrium for bias)
draw_on_liquidity (IPDA range extremes are macro DOL targets)
related_to: quarterly_shifts (quarterly shifts occur when IPDA 60-day range extreme is taken)
dealing_range (IPDA ranges ARE macro dealing ranges)

lookback_ranges.20_day: Short-term reference. Price delivery balances within this range most frequently. Midpoint = institutional equilibrium.
lookback_ranges.40_day: Medium-term reference. Used for swing trade bias. When price exits 20-day range, 40-day extremes become targets.
lookback_ranges.60_day: Long-term reference. Quarterly cycle boundary. When price reaches 60-day extremes, watch for quarterly_shift.

time_and_price: IPDA integrates TIME with PRICE — specific price levels become active at specific times. A 40-day range midpoint has highest significance during NY kill zone, not Asian session.
how_to_use: Before daily analysis, check where price sits within 20/40/60-day ranges. If near a range extreme = high-probability reversal zone. If near midpoint = equilibrium, expect accumulation.

bridge_integration.auto_calculation: IPDA 20/40/60-day ranges computed from H4 data. Each range includes high, low, midpoint, and price percentile position.
bridge_integration.extreme_detection: Price at >90% or <10% of any IPDA range = high-probability reversal zone. Auto-injected into concept chain.
bridge_integration.bias_framework: Price above IPDA midpoint = bullish bias for that timeframe. Below = bearish. 20d for intraday, 40d for swing, 60d for position.
bridge_integration.score_impact: Price at IPDA extreme + sweep + displacement = highest-conviction reversal setup. Price at midpoint = equilibrium (reduce size, expect chop).
bridge_integration.tp_targeting: IPDA range midpoints and extremes serve as DOL targets. 20d midpoint for intraday TP, 40d extreme for swing TP.

trading_rules.rule_1: At IPDA 20-day extreme: look for intraday reversal setups (Silver Bullet, OTE entries)
trading_rules.rule_2: At IPDA 40-day extreme: look for swing reversal with HTF displacement confirmation
trading_rules.rule_3: At IPDA 60-day extreme: potential quarterly shift — highest significance macro level
trading_rules.rule_4: Price between 40-60% of any range = equilibrium zone. Reduce conviction, expect range-bound action.
trading_rules.rule_5: IPDA ranges are NESTED — 20d range moves within 40d range, which moves within 60d range. All three must be considered.
